# ECC Security Rules Reference (Imported)

Source: `affaan-m/everything-claude-code` @ `da4db99c94cf272d3341910bc8c8a26d2e6e6960` (MIT)

This folder contains a **safe, documentation-only subset** of reusable security rule references:
- `common-security.md`
- `typescript-security.md`
- `python-security.md`

Why this subset:
- High value as concise security checklists
- No executable code copied
- Minimal duplication and easy maintenance

Not included here:
- Installers, hooks, automation scripts, or autonomy-oriented skills
- Any modules that encourage remote script piping (`curl | bash`) patterns
